title: Cam's Cartoonied
description: Cartoon-styled Minecraft modpack with smooth performance, vibrant shaders, clean UI, and animations.
body:
# 🎨 Introducing Cam's Cartoonied

[![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jKXPk4ZT/images/d9d7248bf4c3e86c6707c4e05c2cffcb29c151e0.png)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jKXPk4ZT/images/d9d7248bf4c3e86c6707c4e05c2cffcb29c151e0.png)

**Cam's Cartoonied** is a performance-enhanced, visually vibrant modpack that mixes clean cartoon-style graphics with high FPS and rich quality-of-life tweaks. Built to keep Minecraft feeling familiar while looking fresh, it’s the perfect blend of aesthetic and efficiency — no compromises needed.

---

## 🧩 Mods

<details>
<summary>🔧 Visual & Performance Tweaks</summary>

- **Dynamic Lights** – Light your surroundings by holding torches or glow items.
- **Entity Model & Texture Features** – Randomized mob variants and smoother animations.
- **Low Fire & Low Shield** – Better visibility during combat.
- **Iris + Sodium + Lithium** – Best-in-class rendering, FPS boosts, and world optimization.
- **Inventory Sorter + Mouse Tweaks** – Effortless inventory management with middle-click sorting.
- **Simple Menu + Mod Menu** – Streamlined UI with full mod visibility and customization.

</details>

<details>
<summary>🛠️ Utility & Backend</summary>

- **Bad Packets, Fabric API, Kotlin, Placeholder API** – Core frameworks that make other mods work.
- **Collective, Balm, LibJF, TCD Commons** – Shared libraries for mod support.
- **Essential-container & ViaFabricPlus** – Compatibility support for servers and networking.

</details>

<details>
<summary>🗺️ World & Navigation</summary>

- **JourneyMap + JourneyMap WebMap** – Optional minimap with fullscreen map and browser view.
- **Simple Voice Chat** – Proximity-based multiplayer voice chat support.

</details>

---

## 🧵 Resource Packs

<details>
<summary>🎨 Visual Enhancements</summary>

- **🟩 Bare Bones 1.21.5** – Minimalist textures with a clean, blocky aesthetic.
- **🎭 Fresh Animations v1.9.4** – Adds expressive, smooth animations to mobs.
- **🍇 Fancy Crops v1.1** – Makes farms and crops prettier and more vibrant.
- **💡 Icons v1.11.4 + AR’s OreUI Dark** – Clean dark-mode GUI elements.
- **🧊 ToolTips Stylized + UniqueDark UI** – Slick interface tweaks for tooltips and menus.

</details>

---

## 🌅 Shader Packs

<details>
<summary>💡 Choose from three handpicked shader sets</summary>

- **✨ BSL v10.0** – Balanced cartoony glow with smooth ambient lighting.
- **🌄 Complementary Reimagined r5.5.1** – Vibrant, soft, expressive – best for Bare Bones.
- **🕶 Complementary Unbound r5.5.1** – Bold colors and stylized shadows for a toon look.

</details>

---

## ⚙️ Configs & Optimization

<details>
<summary>🧪 How it runs and why it matters</summary>

- Everything is pre-tuned for performance and beauty.
- No client-side bloat — lightweight, modular design.
- Plug and play — no setup needed.

</details>

---

## ❓ FAQ – Quick Answers

<details>
<summary>1. How do I install this?</summary>
Use Prism, MultiMC, or manual install. Import the zip or drop into `.minecraft`. Need help? Ask!
</details>

<details>
<summary>2. Will it run well on my PC?</summary>
Yes — Sodium, Lithium, and Iris give huge FPS boosts. Runs great even on low-end machines.
</details>

<details>
<summary>3. Can I join servers with this pack?</summary>
Yes! Most mods are client-only. ViaFabricPlus lets you connect to older-version servers too.
</details>

<details>
<summary>4. What if I don’t want shaders?</summary>
Just turn them off in the shader menu. You still get all performance + UI benefits.
</details>

<details>
<summary>5. Can I use other texture packs or shaders?</summary>
Yes, feel free to swap any resource pack or Iris-compatible shader you prefer.
</details>

<details>
<summary>6. Does voice chat work on servers?</summary>
Only on servers that also have Simple Voice Chat installed. Otherwise, it stays off.
</details>

<details>
<summary>7. Can I customize the pack further?</summary>
Definitely — it’s modular. Add/remove anything you want and it’ll still run smooth.
</details>
